creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tobias Kortkamp from comment #3)
Thanks for the comment.
This is configuration issue and is useful for new users to FreeBSD.
I agree this patch will never be merged.
I will ask fontconfig maintainer defaulting no-bitmaps.conf.

First impression is important and never be changed.
I hope new users love FreeBSD desktop.
